From the Publisher
About the Puzzle Baron Series 
Every Puzzle Baron puzzle book contains hours of brain-challenging fun for all ages and experience levels. Whether you like finding subtle differences between photos, cracking cryptographic quotes, or solving the most challenging number-based headscratchers, the Puzzle Baron offers something for you. 
Explore the Puzzle Baron catalogue and you’ll find all the puzzle types you can think of! Picture puzzles, cryptograms, sudoku, logic puzzles—you name it! But can you solve them all? 
What are Fiendish Logic Puzzles? 
If you’ve enjoyed the Puzzle Baron’s previous logic puzzle books, here’s your chance to really show off. These puzzles still offer the background story and text-based clues, but they cover two pages and you’ll need to use one of 15 advanced solution methods to solve them. 
You can still compare your solution times against competitors: Each puzzle includes the average completion time, the record completion time, and the percentage of puzzlers who can complete the puzzle. You’ll instantly know how fast your brain works. 
Put on your thinking cap and enjoy endless hours of brain challenges!

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This is actually my second time ordering this book.  I have completed their other logic books in the series. This time I will erase after completion so I can reuse the same book.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on March 17, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Best Book Available For Logic Puzzle Nerds
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I love logic puzzles, and this is the best book I've found for them. Every single puzzle has 4 variables, each with either 6 or 7 options. There are between 8 and 16 clues for each. The puzzles are entirely self-contained, requiring no "background knowlege" to complete, only logic. Most of the puzzles have *no* superfluous clues. As an adult who loves logic puzzles, they still take me at least 30 min to finish one.  Extra points for more gender and ethnic diversity than most puzzles.  The book also references instruction slides on the Puzzle Barons website, which are very well-made, and the website also features fill-in answer grids that provide you with your next logical step and an explanation why.I loved this book so much that I actually bought another copy after leaving my first one on vacation.

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I got into logic puzzles during the pandemic and decided I would make my way through all four books. productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I’ve been addicted to logic puzzles for years now. This is by far the most challenging compilation of puzzles I’ve ever purchased. I’m only about 15 puzzles into it, but so far it seems like the clues are all structured very much the same for each puzzle. For example, there are a lot of ‘X’ is either ‘this one’ or ‘that one.’ It would be nice to have a little more variety on clue structure, but it’s not a big deal. The paper is nice and sturdy. The boxes are large. Though there’s no explanation for them, the answers are all very neatly provided in the back of the book. I would highly recommend for any logic puzzle addict!

raw_products.bookDescription:
Ready to Unleash Your Inner Detective and Sharpen Your Mind?
A mysterious death. Conflicting witnesses. Evidence that doesn’t quite add up.
Embark on a thrilling journey through 100 murder mystery-themed logic puzzles, where every puzzle is part of a larger story. Instead of random, disconnected puzzles, each case’s story unfolds across a sequence of interconnected logic grids. Every time you solve a puzzle, new pieces of evidence come to light, interviews, timelines, evidence, and hidden motives that move the investigation forward until the hidden story behind the crime finally emerges.
Whether you're a longtime puzzle solver or completely new to logic grid puzzles, this book offers a perfect blend of satisfaction and challenge!
Why You'll Love This Puzzle Book
Immersive CasesStep into gripping investigations involving corporate conspiracies, suspicious lab deaths, missing persons cases, hidden family secrets, and other intriguing scenarios that make each puzzle feel like a real detective case file.
Gradual Difficulty That Builds Your SkillsStart with smaller, approachable 3x4 grids and work your way toward more complex 4x7 grids to flex your detective muscles. Solutions and hints are included, so you can check your answers or get a helpful nudge if you get stuck.
A Brain-Boosting, Screen-Free ChallengeStrengthen logical reasoning, pattern recognition, focus, and attention to detail while enjoying a relaxing mental workout. It’s the perfect way to keep your brain engaged without staring at another screen.
Solve the MysteryEach murder mystery case unfolds across multiple puzzles, bringing you closer to the truth. Solve them all to uncover the full story behind the crime.
Satisfying “Aha!” MomentsEvery puzzle is carefully crafted with clean logic and thoughtful clues so you can solve through deduction—not guesswork. Experience the rewarding moment when the final piece clicks into place and the entire mystery makes sense.
And as a bonus, you’ll also get access to 50 additional printable logic grid puzzles to sharpen your skills further!
If you're ready to dive into a gripping investigation, click “Buy Now” and grab your copy today!

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Hours and hours of fun for me!!!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This puzzle book, "The Ultimate Logic Grid Puzzle Book," is just the thing to keep your mind sharp! As a former teacher, I always appreciated the power of a good brain teaser. It's like exercise for the mind, wouldn't you agree? And as a homeschooling pioneer, I often looked for engaging ways to help my children develop their critical thinking skills. These logic grid puzzles are perfect for that. I bought many of these kinds of books for my children and grandchildren. When they got tired of them, I finished off all the puzzles.Even now, in my retirement, I still enjoy a good mental challenge. It's a way to stay active and alert, especially on those days when traveling isn't in the cards. I can imagine sitting on my porch, sipping some tea, and working through these puzzles. They offer a good variety too, not too easy, not too frustrating – just right to get the gears turning. Plus, with 100 puzzles in the collection, there are plenty to keep me occupied. This would also make a lovely gift for my grandchildren. A well-made puzzle book like this is a wonderful alternative to just staring at a screen. But I've learned my lesson from buying logic puzzle books for others. Now I keep these books for myself.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on May 20, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Hours of Fun and Engaging Puzzles!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: When my son brought home a logic puzzle from his math class, I was reminded how much I enjoyed working through them.  It had been years since I last did a logic puzzle, so I looked through Amazon's offerings and found this book.  The reviews were positive, so I decided to try it.  I wanted a book that had a variety of challenge levels and this book has delivered!  There are four levels of challenge, so I bounce around the book based on how much time I have and how hard I want to work my brain :)  The stories for the puzzles are varied and interesting - sometimes I choose the puzzle based on the topic!  I'm looking forward to ordering the next two books once I finish this one.As others have said, the paper is high quality and the print quality is very good too.  When I need to erase my work, everything erases cleanly with no impact on the paper, grid or clues.  The size of the book is good, as is the font size of the print.As a very positive side note, there was a puzzle that I was stuck on, so I emailed the publisher for help.  I very quickly received a response and happily continued puzzling!Order this book, you won't regret it!!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on October 22, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Challenging & Enjoyable, with a few printing issues.
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I really love this book so far, there's a gradual increase in difficulty with each puzzle. Category locations move around a lot more in this book than others I've tried, encouraging the player to focus on the clues rather than defaulting to pattern recognition (which was my main issue with Puzzle Baron's books)My only complaints are with the print in the book itself - longer clues are printed very close to the spine of the book, making it easy to miss things like numbers hiding in the fold (photo attached).The spacing between individual clues and the spacing between each line of text, is identical, which makes it difficult to separate the clues visually.I've also found a few typos throughout the book, but so far nothing that impacts puzzle completion.If you're able to overlook or adjust to the printing issues, the puzzles themselves are very entertaining.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on April 27, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Perfect choice for veterans of Logic Grids - unique and challenging!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Just to be clear, this book also does a great job explaining logic grids to newcomers, and easing them into it with a series of 1 and 2-flame puzzles (on a scale of 1-4 "spicy-hot" flames).However, as a lover of Logic Grids, my problem has always been finding a collection that is challenging without being repetitive and boring. I scour websites (like Puzzle Baron) and have bought other books, but I often end up disappointed, or finding only a few puzzles per book that grab me.Unicorn Books really brought it all with this one.First, the book itself is a nice size - ie, font easy on the eyes,  clear print and high-quality paper that makes it easy to erase. And you might erase a lot, on some of those 4-flame puzzles!The themes for the puzzles are current, interesting and cohesive (instead of just random collections of unrelated data).The 4-flame puzzles are a true challenge - not just a matter of correctly entering clues into the grid, but also collating and analyzing groups of clues, or using process of elimination within the grid, etc.; I was worried at first that there were "too many" 3-flame puzzles that wouldn't be challenging enough - but nope! Even those proved to be engaging - and I admit to having had to erase and re-do a couple of those as well!Best of all are the linked 2-grids-in-one-puzzle puzzles!  Sharing a common theme, each has its own set of clues, but then there are also 1-3 clues that cross-reference the other. SUPER challenging and fun! I'm hoping Volume 2 will have even more unique twists like that - and am eagerly awaiting its arrival.Already hoping for a Volume 3 in near future!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on June 19, 2023

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Interesting, challenging, fun, and teaching all in one book!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This logic book is for all of us who know and understand the importance of using our brains to do more than just sit in our skulls , aging away, while slowly becoming  weak and useless—because of  boredom, disuse, and lifeless intent—just waiting and anxious to be used— to learn new things, to figure out, and to be ready for the next challenge!This book is great with a diverse sets of interesting puzzles ranging from easy to quite difficult— with the added benefits of not only having a range of difficulties— but also being fun with teaching explanations and a free included grid logic thinking and learning module in the back of the book!This book has follow-up books that continue your logic journey—you may even want to go back to college after experiencing these clever,  original, and addictive puzzles! Could not recommend them any more strongly! Great for any age person wanting a mentally stimulating subject book that satisfies the yearning brain!

aPlusContent.rawText:
From the Publisher
About the Puzzle Baron Series 
Every Puzzle Baron puzzle book contains hours of brain-challenging fun for all ages and experience levels. Whether you like finding subtle differences between photos, cracking cryptographic quotes, or solving the most challenging number-based headscratchers, the Puzzle Baron offers something for you. 
Explore the Puzzle Baron catalogue and you’ll find all the puzzle types you can think of! Picture puzzles, cryptograms, sudoku, logic puzzles—you name it! But can you solve them all? 
What are Logic Puzzles? 
Gather around for a story from the Puzzle Baron: Piece together the text-based clues to answer the puzzler’s questions. You won’t need much more than pure logic and a pencil (with an eraser) to try to solve these conundrums. 
You can even compare your solution times against competitors: Each puzzle includes the average completion time, the record completion time, and the percentage of puzzlers who can complete the puzzle. Because the puzzles increase in difficulty, you’re guaranteed endless hours of challenges. 
Put on your thinking cap and have fun testing your brain power!

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Logic problems have always seemed nigh impossible to me. But I noticed my dad had a giant book of logic problems last year that he was more or less discarding—he has always liked them but he is getting old now and just doesn’t seen to have the brain power to do them anymore—so I decided to take it and genuinely try to solve even one. Well I did and got hooked on them. I have only ever tried any out of that particular book and since it is so huge physically, I wanted to find a smaller one that I can more easily take with me when I go places. I decided to give Puzzle Baron Logic Puzzles a try and I am glad I did!The good things about this book…The physical size and format. I can fit this in my purse and it is not super bulky or heavy so it’s pretty easy to take it around with me. The book easily opens and I do not have trouble filling in any of the spaces or reading the text due to proximity to the spine or any of that. The pages are easy to write on.The organization of puzzles—they are sorted based on ease and based on the “solve rate” of players. I think sorting based on difficulty is standard but I have not seen data on the difficulty of each puzzle in other books. Each puzzle shows the solve rate, the average time the puzzle the puzzle took players to solve, and even the best time it was solved in and the username of the person who solved it. This must come from the website but I have not verified it or looked yet. I found it really interesting to see the percentage of players who solved each puzzle and to compare myself against that—I do not care about the times. I know I would not even be close to the times listed but nonetheless it is interesting to see!If I have one criticism of the book it would just be that the print for the puzzles is very small! I do not have “old eyes” yet but even so I wish the size were just a touch bigger. Most logic puzzles seem to be pretty small font in general because of how much needs to fit on the page but this one seems just a bit smaller than the typical book I see.The only other thing I noticed is that all of the puzzles in this book are six grids. I have seen logic puzzles that have more than six grids but this one does not. To me that is not a huge deal since I am not smart enough to deal with more than six anyway, but someone else might want to have this information. Also, there are no variations or different types of logic puzzles in the book. From start to finish, it’s all six-grid problems. That is also okay by me since those are the ones I like. I only mention it to provide information for anyone reading this review.The book has a very helpful introduction for anyone who does not know how these sort of logic problems work and offers helpful information on some of the nuances within the clues.Overall I recommend this book. I think it seems to be a decent choice for anyone who has not done logic puzzles but is curious and it is challenging enough for those who already understand how these work. I will definitely purchase more puzzle books from Puzzle Baron.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on May 26, 2022

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: The puzzles are well stated, and fun, but the pages are printed in a reduced size, under 6 X 9 inches ( 15cm X 228mm ).  Probably about 9 point print. It is almost like reading the fine print on a legal document, and most difficult to write the solution in the box provided.  A nice touch is that they give the solve rate, average solve time and the best time. But I will wager that those times were not recorded with the use of this size book.  My solution for this will be to tear out each page and scan it, and print it on a full size piece of paper.

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This is a great puzzle book for those who love logic grid puzzles. It’s mostly intermediate level. My only criticism of it is that there is some apparent sexism in the way the puzzles are set up, such as using only male names for military service  members, and a few grammatic layers. In addition to tiny grid size to write the solutions. The grid is so small that it may be difficult for people with any visual issues to see it and it’s certainly difficult for people to write that small legibly.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: I WOULD HIGHLY RECOMMEND YOU DO THESE BOOKS WITH VOL. 2 (FIRST), VOL. 1, THEN VOL. 3
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I bought all three volumes so I'll review and post for all three as these books are slightly different.-Volume ONE - Great book. Definitely LOVED it. Started out fairly easy but got harder along the way (puzzles are organized by percentage of users solved as information is given for best time and average which I assume is from their website). By about puzzle 160, I was researching advanced techniques and still got stuck. I actually moved to volume 2 at this point because I wasn't enjoying that much of a struggle.-Volume TWO - Starts out with 3 instead of 5 grid puzzle and slowly moves to harder puzzles and more grids (I really felt this would have been a better volume One as it was much easier than the first). MUCH easier. I was going through many every day as they were only taking about 10 minutes each. Got much trickier about 180 but still VERY enjoyable. Still had Solve Rate, Best Time and Average but was ordered by Average Time which I preferred, not sure why.-Volume THREE - What the hell? First there is only Average Time solve listed which I was fine with but even with the first puzzle, I had to use more advanced techniques than with most of the other volumes (substitutions, mixed pairs, etc.) from the first puzzle forward. I kept looking online to find out what the heck was happening as I breezed through the First and Second volumes pretty quickly. How people can say these are easy is shocking to me as I feel sooo many are missing information to solve them. I am on page 28 and got stumped on at least four of the puzzles with no way to solve except look at the answers for a hint. How people can solve these in 10 minutes is crazy. I even checked the Puzzle Baron forums to see if anyone was having issues but the forums are outdated and Vol. 3 isn't even listed.From the reviews it seems like I am alone in this, but I just can't see how.I WOULD HIGHLY RECOMMEND YOU DO THESE BOOKS WITH VOL. 2 (FIRST), VOL. 1, THEN VOL. 3
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on May 16, 2017

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: I love logic puzzles but, like other reviewers, have struggled to find books of just logic puzzles in the shops.This book was a real find - 200 really well written puzzles, plenty of space for working out and all the answers in the back.  It starts out with relatively easy puzzles and then progresses onto trickier ones - I haven't been brave enough to tackle the ones at the back of the book yet as they look really hard!Each puzzle is rated for difficulty (as a percentage of people who solved it successfully on the Puzzle Baron website - where there are even more puzzles for the true addicts!) and an average time to solve it given.  I'm ashamed to say I'm currently performing below average but enjoying it thoroughly!If you're new to logic puzzles there are lots of instructions at the front.I'd whole-heartedly recommend this book and have already added Volume 2 to my wish list!
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on August 20, 2012

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewTitle: Perfecto para entrenar tu cerebro y practicar con el inglés
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Los puzzles de lógica son mis pasatiempos favoritos y siempre me ha dado mucha rabia que cuando comprabas una revista de crucigramas apenas vinieran uno o dos o incluso no hubiera, bueno pues este librito viene cargadito de ellos y además como están en inglés puedo seguir practicando el idioma de una manera diferente.Son los típicos puzzles de lógica con una historia introductoria y después las diferentes pistas que te ayudan a unir las situaciones con sus protagonistas, en cada página pone el porcentaje de personas que lo han resuelto de media, el tiempo medio para resolverlo y la persona que lo ha resuelto más deprisa en la página web donde tienen estos pasatiempos.Se lo recomiendo a alguien que le gusten los acertijos y además quiera mejorar su inglés, los giros en la redacción que hacen con las diferentes pistas me están ayudando a comprender mejor ciertas expresiones y palabras.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: These are NOT difficult. Easy to Medium is more accurate
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: The title is terribly misleading, for die-hard fans of logic puzzles, and therefore the 3 stars. These range from easy to medium; most are what I would call "advanced beginner" level.The pages are good quality paper, and the grids and clues easy to read and use.  The clues could use a little more creativity - at times they seem formulaic, with only the situations changing.However, I would recommend this set of puzzles for those who have learned the basics, and want to have more practice at slightly larger grids (although none of these are what I'd call 'large'.If you are already at Medium-Difficult level of enjoyment, there are other books out there that are probably more suitable.
